title: Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu — Chapter 1088
main_description: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines. This chapter contains 5 structured story parts and 193 cleaned dialogue lines.
